nasb.text: He did evil in the sight of the Lord like the house of Ahab, for they were his counselors after the death of his father, to his destruction.

esv.text: He did what was evil in the sight of the Lord, as the house of Ahab had done. For after the death of his father they were his counselors, to his undoing.

cnv.text: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，好像亞哈家一樣，因為他的父親死了以後，亞哈家的人就教唆他，好使他滅亡。

ccb.text: 他像亚哈家一样做耶和华视为恶的事，因为他父亲死后，亚哈家便唆使他作恶，使他走向灭亡。
